meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve no design skills (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no design skills. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: User Onboarding to Solve No Design Skills
content.seo_description: Master user onboarding to overcome a lack of design skills. A beginner-level developer checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code to launch your first app.
content.answer_block: You don't need a design degree to create professional apps. By implementing a structured, minimalist user onboarding flow using Antigravity and Claude Code, you guide users to 'Aha!' moments instantly. This focuses user attention on core functionality, effectively masking a lack of complex design assets with high-utility, streamlined interaction patterns.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank screen, code editor open, but your heart sinks. You have the logic, the database, and the vision, but your UI looks like a relic from 1998. The 'no design skills' wall is the silent killer of student projects, stalling momentum before you ever hit deploy.

But here is the engineering secret: design isn't just aesthetics—it's guidance. By mastering user onboarding, you transform a cluttered app into a high-converting journey. Using modern AI-assisted tools like Antigravity and Claude Code, you can architect professional flows that prioritize UX over pixels, turning your prototype into a polished, production-ready experience.

steps.title: Define the 'Aha!' Moment
steps.description: Identify the single feature that provides immediate value. Onboarding should exist solely to move the user to this point as quickly as possible.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my app's core utility and define a 3-step onboarding flow that guides a new user to their first successful action.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'analyze current project logic to identify the primary value-add for new users'

steps.title: Build a Minimalist Welcome Modal
steps.description: Create a clean, distraction-free modal that explains the 'why' before the 'how'. Keep it under 50 words.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a responsive, minimalist React component for a welcome modal that emphasizes immediate value and CTA.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add --file src/components/WelcomeModal.tsx --prompt 'create a clean Tailwind modal for onboarding'

steps.title: Implement Progress Indicators
steps.description: Users feel more in control when they know how many steps remain. Keep it simple: 3 steps max.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a progress bar component that tracks a 3-step onboarding sequence using state management.
steps.claude_code_command: claude update --file src/hooks/useOnboarding.ts --logic 'add state for tracking progress through 3 steps'

steps.title: Contextual Tooltips
steps.description: Instead of a massive tour, use tooltips to highlight specific features only when the user reaches that section.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a reusable tooltip hook that triggers when a user hovers over the core feature area for the first time.

steps.title: The 'Empty State' Reset
steps.description: If the user hasn't created data yet, show a high-impact call to action instead of a blank screen.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an empty-state screen for my dashboard that provides a clear 'Get Started' button to trigger the onboarding flow.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit --file src/pages/Dashboard.tsx --replace 'render empty state with CTA if data is null'

pro_tips: Prioritize 'Time-to-Value' over visual flair; users forgive ugly designs, but they never forgive confusion.
Use micro-copy that speaks to benefits, not features; tell them what they gain, not what they click.
Always include a 'Skip' button; forcing onboarding creates more friction than it solves.
Data-driven onboarding: store the onboarding status in local storage so returning users don't see it twice.
Test your flow with a friend who has never seen your code; if they ask 'what now?', your onboarding failed.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is live, deploy your project to Vercel or Netlify and gather feedback from at least five real users to iterate on your core value proposition.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools, the logic, and the roadmap to turn your code into a professional product. Stop worrying about design and start focusing on the user experience. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
